title: HDFC Bank Workforce Drops by Over 3,300 as Operations Automated
title_cn: 随着运营自动化，HDFC 银行员工人数减少 3,300 多人
summary: HDFC Bank Ltd.’s workforce declined by 3,343 employees in the financial year ended March as India’s largest private lender accelerated efforts to automate operations and redeploy staff to customer-facing roles.

title: Swiggy Unit Gets Food Safety Notices From India Regulator
title_cn: Swiggy Unit 收到印度监管机构的食品安全通知
summary: India’s food regulator issued notices to Swiggy Ltd.’s quick commerce unit Instamart following consumer complaints alleging supply of expired, spoiled and contaminated food products through it.

title_cn: 多伦多枪击案造成两人死亡 警方正在寻找嫌疑人
summary: A shooting at a street festival in Toronto on Saturday evening left two men dead and at least four others injured, with multiple suspects still at large.

title_cn: 巴斯夫称德国工厂发生化学品泄漏
summary: A nitric acid leak at BASF SE’s main plant in Germany on Saturday sent a chemical cloud over the facility that was hosed down by firefighters, the company said in a statement.

summary: Bondholders including Arini, BlackRock and Sculptor joined forces in a cooperation agreement

title: Oil Jumps as US and Iran Trade Strikes, Dispute Hormuz Status
title_cn: 美国和伊朗贸易冲突、霍尔木兹地位争议，油价飙升
summary: Oil jumped as the US and Iran exchanged fresh strikes, with the sides offering conflicting statements on whether the Strait of Hormuz remains open to shipping.

title: Oil Climbs, US Futures Dip on Fresh Iran Strikes: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 伊朗新一轮袭击导致油价上涨，美国期货下跌：市场休整
summary: Oil jumped and US equity futures fell after the US launched another round of strikes against Iran, while conflicting claims over the status of the Strait of Hormuz heightened uncertainty.

title: US Renews Iran Strikes as Both Sides Dispute Hormuz Status
title_cn: 由于双方对霍尔木兹海峡地位存在争议，美国再次对伊朗发动打击
summary: The US launched fresh missile attacks against Iran on Sunday in what has become a pattern of strikes and counterstrikes by Washington and Tehran as the two sides issued conflicting declarations over whether the Strait of Hormuz is open to shipping.

title: US Says It Began Launching More Strikes Against Iran at 5pm ET
title_cn: 美国称美国东部时间下午 5 点开始对伊朗发动更多打击
summary: US Central Command forces began launching more strikes against Iran at 5 p.m. ET today, to continue degrading their ability to attack civilian mariners and commercial ships freely transiting the Strait of Hormuz, according to a post on X.

title: 【今朝の5本】仕事を始める前に読んでおきたい厳選ニュース
title_cn: 【今早5篇】精选上班前必读新闻
summary: ​米イラン応酬激化、AI開発競争、グラム上院議員死去、アップルが提訴、半導体株に慎重

title: Traders Grapple With World That’s Good for Dollar, Bad for Bonds
title_cn: 交易员努力应对对美元有利、对债券不利的世界
summary: What’s good for the US dollar isn’t always good for US bonds — but investors are finding ways to work around it.

title: NZ Aims to Sign LNG Import Plant Deal Before November Election
title_cn: 新西兰计划在 11 月大选前签署液化天然气进口工厂协议
summary: New Zealand plans to sign a contract for its first liquefied natural gas import facility before the November election, with the government betting cheaper global LNG prices in coming years will make the fuel an affordable and reliable backup for renewable electricity.

title: Bloomberg This Weekend | Sen. Lindsey Graham Dead, CENTCOM Launches Strikes on Iran
title_cn: 彭博社本周末 |参议员林赛·格雷厄姆去世，中央司令部对伊朗发动袭击
summary:
The news doesn’t stop when markets close. Hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend’s biggest headlines, LIVE from New York.

Joined by  Adm. Daryl Caudle, US Dept of War Chief of Naval Operations, Kurt Volker, fmr. US Ambassador to NATO, Rep. Greg Stanton, (D) Arizona, Shannon Kingston, ABC New State Department Reporter, Romina Ruiz-Goiriena, USA Today Executive Editor Investigations, Storytelling, Caleb Silver, Investopedia Editor-in-Chief, Martha Gimbel, The Budget Lab at Yale, Executive Director & Co-Founder, and Erin Lyall, Journalist & Author of “Food Under Fire.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stanton Warns Hormuz Closure Hurts Economy
title_cn: 斯坦顿警告霍尔木兹关闭会损害经济
summary: Rep. Greg Stanton says the Trump administration needs a stronger diplomatic strategy to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and negotiate a more accountable agreement with Iran, warning the conflict has increased economic and geopolitical risks. He also defends closer ties with Canada, Mexico and other US allies as essential to competing with China, while condemning settler violence in the West Bank following an incident involving Rep. Ro Khanna. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Demographic Shift Tests AI Promise
title_cn: 人口结构变化考验人工智能的前景
summary: Martha Gimbel, executive director and cofounder of the Budget Lab at Yale University, says artificial intelligence is unlikely to offset the economic challenges of an aging population, arguing the US is confronting two major transitions at the same time rather than one solving the other. She says AI could improve productivity in some areas, particularly by helping caregivers with physically demanding tasks, but questions whether consumers will embrace automation in roles where human interaction remains essential. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Warsh and US Inflation Will Set Tone for July Fed Decision
title_cn: 沃什和美国通胀将为 7 月美联储决策定下基调
summary: Kevin Warsh is about to make his first appearance before Congress as Federal Reserve chairman, and during two days of testimony he’ll have new US inflation data to parse with lawmakers.

title: Volker Sees NATO Summit Strengthening Alliance
title_cn: 沃尔克认为北约峰会加强联盟
summary: Former US ambassador to NATO Kurt Volker says the NATO summit reinforces alliance unity, strengthens support for Ukraine and sends a tougher message to Russian President Vladimir Putin, while praising President Donald Trump's more constructive engagement with President Volodymyr Zelensky. Volker says Ukraine's battlefield innovation and sustained pressure on Russia are shifting the conflict's momentum, though he warns Putin remains committed to the war and is unlikely to negotiate without greater leverage. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Market Prices In Hormuz Resilience
title_cn: 霍尔木兹地区的石油市场价格具有弹性
summary: Bloomberg Intelligence senior commodities strategist Mike McGlone says oil markets are largely accepting US assurances that the Strait of Hormuz remains open, with expanding Western Hemisphere supply and alternative export routes limiting the long-term impact of Gulf disruptions on crude prices. He says gasoline and diesel prices remain elevated because refining margins have widened, but expects crude oil prices to trend lower over time as global supply grows and demand softens. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Navy Chief Backs Bigger NATO Role
title_cn: 海军参谋长支持北约发挥更大作用
summary: Chief of Naval Operations Adm. Daryl Caudle says NATO's naval alliances remain strong as the US shifts more responsibility to allies while focusing on capabilities only the US Navy can provide. He says the Navy is accelerating autonomous systems, preparing for growing competition in the Arctic and protecting global sea lanes as critical priorities for US national security. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Big Banks Set Up Strong Earnings Week
title_cn: 大银行公布强劲的财报周
summary: Bloomberg Intelligence analyst Herman Chan says major US banks are poised to report strong earnings, driven by trading, investment banking and resilient lending, with investors focused on consumer health, credit quality, net interest margins and AI-related financing activity. Investopedia editor Caleb Silver says Netflix is expanding beyond streaming into advertising and short-form content as investors look for signs the company can sustain growth and define its next phase. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Markets Watch Walsh's First Testimony
title_cn: 市场关注沃尔什的首次证词
summary: Bloomberg's Michael McKee says Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Walsh is likely to use his first Humphrey-Hawkins testimony to emphasize price stability while avoiding firm guidance on future policy moves as lawmakers press him on inflation, the balance sheet and his newly created policy task forces. McKee says investors will also focus on fresh inflation data and whether rising energy prices alter expectations that the Fed holds rates steady or resumes tightening later this year. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Phoebe Gates Startup Draws Tracking Scrutiny
title_cn: 菲比·盖茨 (Phoebe Gates) 初创公司受到跟踪审查
summary: Bloomberg technology editor Olivia Solon says Phoebe Gates' shopping startup, Phia, appears to overwrite affiliate tracking cookies, potentially redirecting sales commissions from publishers and influencers without users intentionally engaging with the service. She says Phia has acknowledged and fixed the issue, while questions remain over whether the behavior was intentional and what legal or financial consequences could follow for its affiliate partnerships. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The $360 Billion Market that Medicine Got Wrong for 20 Years
title_cn: 3600亿美元的市场，医学已经错了20年
summary: The $360 billion dollar women’s health market is made of several categories that are often overlooked – one of which is menopause. The condition has gone largely unnoticed by pharma and biotech firms, employers, and investors, despite affecting half the world’s population and contributing to major losses in productivity. That is starting to change as celebrities like Naomi Watts, startups such as Stripes and Midi Health, and investors including Amboy Street Ventures turn women’s midlife health into a fast-growing market. The shift has accelerated alongside the FDA’s rollback of long-standing warnings on hormone replacement therapy. But as the category grows, so does the challenge for women trying to distinguish evidence-based care from unproven wellness products and marketing hype.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fresh Strikes Threaten US Iran Talks
title_cn: 新的袭击威胁美国伊朗谈判
summary: Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar and ABC News' Shannon Kingston say renewed attacks in and around the Strait of Hormuz have undermined fragile diplomatic efforts, with Gulf allies pressing to revive negotiations as shipping and regional security remain under threat. They say technical talks continue to face resistance from hardline factions in Iran, while Sen. Lindsey Graham's death leaves a significant void for US foreign policy and bipartisan support for Ukraine. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Funds Fret Over $4.4 Trillion AI Trio’s Grip on Emerging Markets
title_cn: 基金担心 4.4 万亿美元的人工智能三重奏对新兴市场的控制
summary: Investors are rotating beyond AI winners in emerging markets, where just three technology stocks worth $4.4 trillion drive an outsized share of returns.

title: How Founder Control Is Reshaping Public Markets
title_cn: 创始人控制如何重塑公共市场
summary: SpaceX’s record-setting IPO gave public investors access to one of the world’s most valuable companies, but not equal voting rights. CEO Elon Musk holds just over 40% of the company’s equity while controlling more than 80% of the vote. IPO adviser Lise Buyer says dual-class shares can protect founders from short-term market pressure, but Harvard Law School’s Lucian Bebchuk warns that SpaceX’s structure goes much further, raising risks around accountability, succession, conflicts of interest, and shareholder value. Some investors, including Danish pension fund AkademikerPension, have already rejected the stock over what they call “catastrophic governance,” turning SpaceX into a test case for how much control public markets are willing to give superstar founders. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: World Cup Bets on Prediction Markets May Get Tax Edge Over Gambling
title_cn: 世界杯预测市场的投注可能比赌博获得税收优势
summary: Americans using prediction markets to bet on the World Cup may face a lighter tax burden than peers wagering through sportsbooks thanks to tax breaks aimed at investments.

title: Hormuz Reopening Faces Costly Hurdles
title_cn: 霍尔木兹重新开放面临代价高昂的障碍
summary: Senior Fellow at the Council on Foreign Relations Clara Gillispie says Gulf energy flows face an uncertain recovery as producers work to clear ships, bring in tankers, restart halted output and repair damage to refineries, LNG facilities and ports. She says the Strait of Hormuz remains unstable, with shipping still below prewar levels and US pressure on Iran complicating efforts to restore safe passage. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hormuz Reopening Faces Costly Hurdles
title_cn: 霍尔木兹重新开放面临代价高昂的障碍
summary: Senior Fellow at the Council on Foreign Relations Clara Gillispie says Gulf energy flows face an uncertain recovery as producers work to clear ships, bring in tankers, restart halted output and repair damage to refineries, LNG facilities and ports. She says the Strait of Hormuz remains unstable, with shipping still below prewar levels and US pressure on Iran complicating efforts to restore safe passage. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Options Brokers With Niche Expertise Defy Automation, AI Shift
title_cn: 拥有利基专业知识的期权经纪商挑战自动化、人工智能转变
summary: In an equity market increasingly shaped by automation and artificial intelligence, some options brokers are still thriving.

title: Hormuz Route Open Despite Iran Declaration, Maritime Group Says
title_cn: 海事集团称，尽管伊朗声明，霍尔木兹航线仍开放
summary: The Strait of Hormuz’s southern route remained open to shipping on Sunday despite Iran declaring the waterway closed as tit-for-tat attacks between the US and Tehran escalated, a maritime advisory group said.

title: Typhoon Bavi Weakens as Heavy Rain Spreads Across China
title_cn: 台风巴威减弱，大雨席卷中国
summary: China’s National Meteorological Center said Typhoon Bavi weakened to a severe tropical storm on Sunday morning after making landfall in Zhejiang.

title: Korea’s World-Beating Stocks Are Now Trading Cheaper Than Ever
title_cn: 韩国领先世界的股票现在的交易价格比以往任何时候都便宜
summary: South Korea’s blistering stock rally has left investors facing an unlikely backdrop: equities trading at record-low valuations.

title: Modi Courts Pacific Partners as China, US Reshape Region
title_cn: 中美重塑地区格局，莫迪向太平洋合作伙伴示好
summary: From missiles and uranium to critical minerals and sports diplomacy, Prime Minister Narendra Modi used a three-nation tour to deepen India’s Indo-Pacific partnerships as regional powers strengthen ties amid China’s growing influence and uncertainty over US engagement.

title: Banks’ Record Bond Short Sparks Quest for Answers
title_cn: 银行创纪录的债券空头引发寻求答案
summary: For the first time in recent history, primary dealers have gone net short on debt they used to hold billions of dollars of.

title: Netflix Combats Questions About Slowing Growth
title_cn: Netflix 回应有关增长放缓的问题
summary: Netflix’s growth is slowing. What comes next?

title: Apple’s M6, M7 and M8 Chips Show How AI Is Reshaping the Company
title_cn: 苹果的 M6、M7 和 M8 芯片展示了人工智能如何重塑公司
summary: Also: New Apple Pencils are coming.

title: OpenAI, Meta, SpaceXAI Compete for More Cost-Efficient AI Models
title_cn: OpenAI、Meta、SpaceXAI 争夺更具成本效益的人工智能模型
summary: Three prominent artificial intelligence developers released new models over the past week. They all promise to be more advanced, but their biggest immediate selling point may not be what they can do but how little they charge to do it.

title: Zhipu’s Chinese Founder Says Frontier AI Should Stay Open to All
title_cn: 智普创始人表示前沿人工智能应该向所有人开放
summary: The founder of Chinese AI lab Zhipu argued that frontier artificial intelligence should remain broadly accessible rather than controlled by select individuals, weighing in on a growing debate about the risks posed by ever more powerful models.

title: China EVs on Road Have Average Age of 1.8 Years, Newspaper Says
title_cn: 报纸称中国上路电动汽车平均车龄为 1.8 年
summary: Chinese electric vehicles on the road are on average just 1.8 years old, compared with 8.2 years for gasoline-powered cars, 21st Century Business Herald reported, citing a report by the China Association of Automobile Manufacturers and Hejun Consulting.

title: Apple Sues OpenAI Over AI Talent Fight
title_cn: 苹果因人工智能人才争夺战起诉 OpenAI
summary: Bloomberg Tech host Ed Ludlow says Apple's lawsuit against OpenAI reflects an intensifying battle for AI talent and hardware leadership, with Apple alleging former employees improperly took trade secrets as OpenAI expands its device ambitions. He also says SK Hynix expects AI memory demand to outpace supply, plans to increase US investment beyond $35 billion, and sees the next test for the AI boom coming as technology companies report earnings and investors assess whether spending is translating into profits. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI Engineer’s ‘LOL’ Moment Set Stage for Legal Fight With Apple
title_cn: OpenAI 工程师的“哈哈”时刻为与苹果的法律斗争奠定了基础
summary: When iPhone engineer Chang Liu quit for a job at OpenAI’s nascent hardware division, Apple Inc. says he left with more than just years of experience.

title: Why Fox is ‘the most Disciplined’ Media Entertainment Company in the Streaming Era
title_cn: 为什么福克斯是流媒体时代“最自律”的媒体娱乐公司
summary: Media veteran Michael Wolf discusses Allen & Company’s annual Sun Valley Conference and breaks down the mega deals that are reshaping the entertainment industry. He explains why free ad-supported content is the unsung winner of the streaming wars, and digs into the ways AI is changing the value of content.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tencent in Talks to Take Big Manus Stake After Meta Deal Unwound
title_cn: Meta 交易解除后，腾讯洽谈收购 Manus 大量股份
summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. is in discussions to become the largest external shareholder in Manus, in a deal to buy back the agentic AI pioneer after Chinese regulators struck down Meta Platforms Inc.’s blockbuster acquisition.

title: OpenAI Safety Head Heidecke to Leave Firm After Reshuffle: Wired
title_cn: OpenAI 安全主管 Heidecke 将在改组后离开公司：《连线》
summary: OpenAI head of safety Johannes Heidecke is leaving the artificial intelligence company following a reorganization, according to Wired.

title: US Eases Export Curbs on UAE, Opening Door for AI Chip Sales
title_cn: 美国放宽对阿联酋的出口限制，为人工智能芯片销售打开大门
summary: The Trump administration plans to ease export restrictions on the United Arab Emirates, clearing the way for the Gulf state to buy a broad range of advanced technologies including semiconductors needed to boost its artificial intelligence ambitions.

title: Graham Death Sets Up Succession Drama in South Carolina
title_cn: 格雷厄姆之死在南卡罗来纳州引发了继任戏剧
summary: The sudden death of US Senator Lindsey Graham of South Carolina sets up a succession drama in the deeply conservative state that risks throwing the race into chaos less than four months before the midterm elections.

title: McConnell Explains Absence by Saying He Suffered Fall Weeks Ago
title_cn: 麦康奈尔解释缺席原因，称他几周前摔倒了
summary: Senator Mitch McConnell said he suffered a fall in June and contracted pneumonia that required hospitalization, breaking a lengthy silence that triggered weeks of speculation about his health.

title: Lindsey Graham’s Death Deprives Ukraine of Key Trump Whisperer
title_cn: 林赛·格雷厄姆的去世使乌克兰失去了特朗普的关键人物
summary: The death of Senator Lindsey Graham leaves key US allies like Ukraine, which have at times struggled to influence the Trump administration, without one of their most effective conduits to the White House.

title: US Says It Launched New Round of Strikes Against Iran on Sunday
title_cn: 美国称周日对伊朗发动新一轮打击
summary: The US military launched additional strikes against Iran Sunday aimed at further weakening the Islamic Republic’s ability to strike civilian vessels transiting the Strait of Hormuz, the US Central Command said.

title: Lindsey Graham, Senate Hawk Turned Trump Ally, Dies at 71
title_cn: 林赛·格雷厄姆，参议院鹰派变成特朗普盟友，去世，享年 71 岁
summary: Lindsey Graham, the South Carolina senior senator and foreign policy hawk who changed from a Donald Trump skeptic to one of the US president’s strongest allies, died on Saturday. He was 71.

title: Burnham Weighs Bigger Budget as Experts Lobby on Economic Policy
title_cn: 专家游说经济政策，伯纳姆考虑增加预算
summary: Andy Burnham, the UK’s presumptive next prime minister, is considering unveiling a bolstered budget later this year as allies and experts seek to persuade him to pursue a land tax, public control of utilities and a more ambitious devolution strategy.

title: DOJ Investigating Allegations Against UAW President Shawn Fain
title_cn: 美国司法部正在调查针对 UAW 主席 Shawn Fain 的指控
summary: The US Justice Department launched a grand jury investigation into allegations that the head of the United Auto Workers pressured another high-ranking union official to secure benefits for his fiancée and her sister, according to internal communications within the labor organization.

title: Zelenskyy Cabinet Shakeup Puts Kyiv’s Winter Resilience in Focus
title_cn: 泽伦斯基内阁改组将基辅的冬季恢复能力置于焦点
summary: Volodymyr Zelenskyy’s surprise move to overhaul his government and potentially install an energy executive as prime minister is the latest sign of the Ukrainian president’s determination to spare his war-weary nation a repeat of last winter’s hardships.

title: Senator Lindsey Graham Dies at 71
title_cn: 参议员林赛·格雷厄姆去世，享年 71 岁
summary: Lindsey Graham, the South Carolina senior senator and foreign policy hawk who changed from a Donald Trump skeptic to one of the US president’s strongest allies, died on Saturday. He was 71. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Zelenskyy Ousts Premier, Weighs Naftogaz Chief for the Role
title_cn: 泽伦斯基罢免总理，任命 Naftogaz 首席执行官
summary: President Volodymyr Zelenskyy removed Ukraine’s prime minister as part of a shift in “political strategy,” and may tap a state energy executive or former premier as her replacement as Kyiv prepares for winter under the threat of continued Russian attacks.

title: Zimbabwe President Says Term Extension Decision Was ‘Collective’
title_cn: 津巴布韦总统表示延长任期的决定是“集体的”
summary: Zimbabwean President Emmerson Mnangagwa said a constitutional amendment to extend his tenure by two more years was a collective decision, the Sunday Mail reported.

title: Graham Leaves Lasting Mark on Senate
title_cn: 格雷厄姆在参议院留下了持久的印记
summary: Bloomberg Congressional reporter Erik Wasson says Sen. Lindsey Graham leaves a significant void in the Republican Party as a leading advocate of an interventionist foreign policy, defense spending and a strong US role abroad. Wasson says Graham evolved into a key ally of President Donald Trump, helping advance the administration's judicial agenda while remaining an influential voice on national security, with attention now turning to who could succeed him in the Senate. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South Africa Says 53,449 Migrants Returned or Deported in Crackdown
title_cn: 南非称 53,449 名移民在镇压中被遣返或驱逐出境
summary: South Africa said more than 53,000 foreign nationals had been processed for deportation or voluntary repatriation as authorities acted on pledges to speed up removals while warning vigilante groups to stop conducting illegal searches for undocumented foreigners.

title: Bloomberg This Weekend | Trump Threats to “Decimate” Iran, Trade Secret Lawsuit
title_cn: 彭博社本周末 |特朗普威胁“消灭”伊朗，商业秘密诉讼
summary: The news doesn’t stop when markets close. Hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend’s biggest headlines, LIVE from New York. Joined by Adm. Daryl Caudle, US Dept of War Chief of Naval Operations, Clara Gillispie, Council on Foreign Relations Sr. Fellow for Climate & Energy, and Colin Demarest, Future of Defense Reporter for Axios. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Asean Begins Re-Engaging Myanmar in First Talks Since 2021 Coup
title_cn: 东盟开始与缅甸重新接触，参加 2021 年政变以来的首次会谈
summary: Southeast Asian nations re-engaged with Myanmar’s government after years of limited contact, while reiterating it must comply with the bloc’s five-point peace consensus before ties can be fully normalized.

title: Trump Embraces Australian Retirement System Backed by Larry Fink
title_cn: 特朗普拥抱拉里·芬克支持的澳大利亚退休制度
summary: The world’s most-envied retirement plan has another high-profile booster: President Donald Trump.

title: Bloomberg This Weekend | Trump Threats to “Decimate” Iran, Trade Secret Lawsuit
title_cn: 彭博社本周末 |特朗普威胁“消灭”伊朗，商业秘密诉讼
summary:
The news doesn’t stop when markets close. Hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend’s biggest headlines, LIVE from New York. Joined by Adm. Daryl Caudle, US Dept of War Chief of Naval Operations, Clara Gillespie, Council on Foreign Relations Sr. Fellow for Climate & Energy, and Colin Demarest, Future of Defense Reporter for Axios.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Rejects South China Sea Ruling on 10-Year Anniversary
title_cn: 中国在南海裁决成立十周年之际拒绝接受裁决
summary: China renewed its rejection of the South China Sea arbitration ruling and criticized a joint statement by the US and its allies marking the 10th anniversary of the decision.

title: Ukraine Says It Hit Russia’s Syzran Refinery, Azov Sea Tankers
title_cn: 乌克兰称其袭击了俄罗斯的Syzran炼油厂和Azov Sea Tankers
summary: Ukraine said it struck a refinery in Russia’s Samara region far from the nations’ border as well as a number of tankers in the Sea of Azov, the latest in a series of attacks on vessels and energy infrastructure.

title: UK Police Say New Suspect Arrested in Ann Widdecombe Murder
title_cn: 英国警方称安·维德科姆谋杀案的新嫌疑人被捕
summary: UK police said they arrested a suspect on Saturday on suspicion of the murder of former minister and Reform UK politician Ann Widdecombe.

title: US Launches Fresh Iran Strikes as Tehran Declares Hormuz Closed
title_cn: 德黑兰宣布霍尔木兹海峡关闭，美国对伊朗发动新一轮打击
summary: The US launched its third round of strikes on Iran this week as Tehran declared that it’s closing the Strait of Hormuz “until further notice.”

title: Malaysia’s Ex-Ruling Party Wins Johor as Anwar Group Loses Seats
title_cn: 安瓦尔集团失去席位 马来西亚前执政党赢得柔佛州
summary: Malaysia’s former ruling party Barisan Nasional strengthened its grip on the country’s fastest-growing state in elections Saturday, in a blow to Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim’s Pakatan Harapan coalition.

title: US Subpoenas NY Times Reporters Over Air Force One Story
title_cn: 美国就空军一号的报道向《纽约时报》记者发出传票
summary: Federal prosecutors issued subpoenas late Friday compelling five New York Times journalists to reveal their sources for two stories about security shortcomings on the new Qatari-gifted presidential jet, the news organization said.

title: UK’s Reeves to Focus on AI Opportunities in Speech to City
title_cn: 英国里夫斯将在城市演讲中关注人工智能机会
summary: Rachel Reeves heads to what’s likely to be her last City of London event next week, a final opportunity to defend her legacy after almost exactly two years as the UK’s first woman Chancellor of the Exchequer.

title: McConnell’s Absence Prompts New Beshear Demand for Health Update
title_cn: 麦康奈尔的缺席引发了新的贝希尔对健康更新的需求
summary: Kentucky Governor Andy Beshear, a Democrat, renewed his call for Mitch McConnell, the senior Republican senator from his state, to release information about his health after he was hospitalized on June 14 and hasn’t been seen publicly since.

title: Le Pen Extends Lead in French Election Poll After Court Ruling
title_cn: 法院裁决后勒庞扩大法国大选民调领先优势
summary: Marine Le Pen extended her lead in a voter preference poll ahead of next April’s French presidential election after appeal judges cleared her to enter the race for a fourth time by shortening a previous ban on her standing.

title: Democrats Race to Fill Maine Senate Slot
title_cn: 民主党竞相填补缅因州参议院席位
summary: Bloomberg's Boston Bureau Chief Brooke Sutherland says Maine Democrats are racing to choose a new Senate nominee after Graham Platner withdrew, leaving the party with little time to unify behind a replacement in a race viewed as critical to control of the Senate. She says party leaders face pressure over the candidate vetting process as delegates prepare to select a nominee from a crowded field ahead of the filing deadline. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ukraine Building Patriots Is in Lockheed’s Interest, McCaul Says
title_cn: 麦考尔表示，乌克兰建造爱国者号符合洛克希德公司的利益
summary: US defense contractors including Lockheed Martin Corp. have every interest to let Ukraine manufacture Patriot missile interceptors after President Donald Trump pledged the US would grant a license for the weapons system, a senior Republican lawmaker said.

title: Trump Undercuts GOP Midterms Message With Snub of Housing Bill
title_cn: 特朗普冷落住房法案削弱了共和党中期选举的信息
summary: A sweeping housing bill became law on Saturday without Donald Trump’s signature, or any White House fanfare, after the president soured on a package of dozens of affordability provisions that he derided as “a yawn.”
